name: Correction or Clarification
about: Report an error or suggest a clarification to existing content

labels: 'bug, documentation'
assignees: ''
---

## Issue Type

- [ ] Factual error
- [ ] Unclear definition
- [ ] Incorrect categorization
- [ ] Typo or formatting issue
- [ ] Broken link
- [ ] Other

## Location

**Which section or category is affected?**

## Current Content

**What is currently stated?**

## Proposed Change

**What should it say instead?**

## Reasoning

**Why is this change needed?**

## Additional Context

Any supporting links, references, or information.
